revision.comment: Moved [[Category:8th-century works]] to buildings subcat
1 revision imported: importing wikipedia
fixing the uncategorized categories error
Adding [[Category:kk]][[category:kk]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Kk]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Adding [[Category:making categorization show up on newly imported categories and templates]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Adding [[Category:1 revision imported]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{Commons category}} {{Navseasoncats}}
[[Category:Uncategorized categories]][[Category:8th century in the arts|Architecture]] [[Category:Uncategorized categories]][[Category:Architecture by century|08]] [[Category:Uncategorized categories]][[Category:1st-millennium architecture|08]] [[Category:making categorization show up on newly imported categories and templates]] [[Category:1 revision imported]]
